pi_items.source: Task description specifies survey title 'CARDIA Follow-Up Study - Participant Intake Form 2024'. CARDIA is a real NIH study: Coronary Artery Risk Development in Young Adults.
Task description specifies two question groups: 'Demographic Information' and 'Contact Preferences'.
Task description specifies 5 questions in Demographic Information (email, age, zipcode, income, children) + 2 questions in Contact Preferences (contactmethod, notes) = 7 total.
Task description specifies 'What is your current age in years?' with Minimum: 18. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'What is your current age in years?' with Maximum: 99. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'Enter your 5-digit US ZIP code' with Regex validation for exactly 5 digits. LimeSurvey supports Perl-style regex validation.
Task description specifies 'What is your approximate annual household income in US dollars?' with Min: 0. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'What is your approximate annual household income in US dollars?' with Max: 10000000. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'How many children do you have?' with Min: 0. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'How many children do you have?' with Max: 30. LimeSurvey Numerical input supports min/max validation.
Task description specifies 'Please share any additional information...' (Long free text) with Max characters: 500. LimeSurvey Long free text supports character limits.

privileged_info_summary: This task instructs an agent to create a research participant intake form in LimeSurvey based on the CARDIA study (Coronary Artery Risk Development in Young Adults, a real NIH-funded longitudinal cardiovascular study). The form should contain 2 question groups with 7 total questions: Demographic Information (email with email validation, age 18-99 numerical range, ZIP code with 5-digit regex, income 0-10M numerical range, children 0-30 numerical range) and Contact Preferences (contact method radio list, optional notes field limited to 500 characters). All validation rules and field counts specified in metadata are consistent with the task description and LimeSurvey's documented capabilities.
